# modest-ui

> A minimal, themeable CSS component library.

- Version: 0.1.0
- Docs: https://modest-ui.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/thisismodest/modest-ui
- License: MIT

## Installation

CDN:
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/thisismodest/modest-ui@main/dist/modest-ui.css" />

npm:
  npm install github:thisismodest/modest-ui

Import (bundled):
  @import "modest-ui/dist/modest-ui.css";

Cherry-pick:
  @import "modest-ui/base/tokens.css";
  @import "modest-ui/components/button/button.css";

## Naming Convention

All classes use the `mdst-` prefix with BEM-style naming:
- Block: `.mdst-component`
- Element: `.mdst-component-element`
- Modifier: `.mdst-component--variant`

---

## Design Tokens

Override these CSS custom properties on `:root` to theme the entire library.

### Colors

| Token                | Value    |
| -------------------- | -------- |
| --mdst-color-fg      | #000     |
| --mdst-color-bg      | #fff     |
| --mdst-color-border  | #000     |
| --mdst-color-muted   | #666     |
| --mdst-color-subtle  | #f5f5f5  |
| --mdst-color-surface | #f5f5f5  |
| --mdst-color-focus   | #000     |
| --mdst-color-error   | #dc2626  |
| --mdst-color-success | #16a34a  |

### Button hover

| Token                      | Value                |
| -------------------------- | -------------------- |
| --mdst-button-hover-bg     | var(--mdst-color-fg) |
| --mdst-button-hover-color  | var(--mdst-color-bg) |
| --mdst-button-hover-border | var(--mdst-color-fg) |

### Typography

| Token              | Value                                                                        |
| ------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| --mdst-font-sans   | system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif |
| --mdst-font-mono   | ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace       |
| --mdst-line-height | 1.5                                                                          |

### Font sizes

| Token            | Value    |
| ---------------- | -------- |
| --mdst-text-xs   | 0.75rem  |
| --mdst-text-sm   | 0.875rem |
| --mdst-text-base | 1rem     |
| --mdst-text-lg   | 1.125rem |
| --mdst-text-xl   | 1.25rem  |

### Spacing

| Token           | Value     |
| --------------- | --------- |
| --mdst-space-px | 0.0625rem |
| --mdst-space-1  | 0.25rem   |
| --mdst-space-2  | 0.5rem    |
| --mdst-space-3  | 0.75rem   |
| --mdst-space-4  | 1rem      |
| --mdst-space-5  | 1.25rem   |
| --mdst-space-6  | 1.5rem    |
| --mdst-space-8  | 2rem      |

### Semantic spacing aliases

| Token           | Value               |
| --------------- | ------------------- |
| --mdst-space-xs | var(--mdst-space-1) |
| --mdst-space-sm | var(--mdst-space-2) |
| --mdst-space-md | var(--mdst-space-4) |
| --mdst-space-lg | var(--mdst-space-6) |
| --mdst-space-xl | var(--mdst-space-8) |

### Border

| Token               | Value    |
| ------------------- | -------- |
| --mdst-radius       | 0        |
| --mdst-border-width | 0.0625em |

### Transitions

| Token                  | Value          |
| ---------------------- | -------------- |
| --mdst-transition-fast | 50ms ease-out  |
| --mdst-transition      | 100ms ease-out |

---

## Components

---

### Button `.mdst-button`

Button component with inverted, ghost, and outline variants in multiple sizes.

Classes:
- `.mdst-button`
- `.mdst-button--ghost`
- `.mdst-button--inverted`
- `.mdst-button--lg`
- `.mdst-button--sm`

```html
<button class="mdst-button">Default</button>
<button class="mdst-button mdst-button--inverted">Inverted</button>
<button class="mdst-button mdst-button--ghost">Ghost</button>
<button class="mdst-button mdst-button--sm">Small</button>
<button class="mdst-button mdst-button--lg">Large</button>
```

---

### Card `.mdst-card`

A bordered container for grouping content with optional header, body, and footer sections.

Classes:
- `.mdst-card`
- `.mdst-card-body`
- `.mdst-card-footer`
- `.mdst-card-header`
- `.mdst-card--borderless`
- `.mdst-card--compact`
- `.mdst-card--flush`
- `.mdst-card--interactive`

```html
<!-- Basic card -->
<div class="mdst-card">
  <div class="mdst-card-body">Content</div>
</div>

<!-- With header, body, and footer -->
<div class="mdst-card">
  <div class="mdst-card-header">Title</div>
  <div class="mdst-card-body">Content goes here.</div>
  <div class="mdst-card-footer">
    <button class="mdst-button mdst-button--sm">Action</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Interactive (hover state) -->
<div class="mdst-card mdst-card--interactive">
  <div class="mdst-card-body">Clickable card</div>
</div>

<!-- Compact padding -->
<div class="mdst-card mdst-card--compact">
  <div class="mdst-card-body">Tight content</div>
</div>

<!-- Flush body (no body padding, for tables/images) -->
<div class="mdst-card mdst-card--flush">
  <div class="mdst-card-header">Table card</div>
  <div class="mdst-card-body">
    <table class="mdst-table">...</table>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

### Checkbox `.mdst-checkbox`

Checkbox component with label support, checked, and disabled states.

Classes:
- `.mdst-checkbox`
- `.mdst-checkbox-label`

```html
<!-- With label (recommended) -->
<label class="mdst-checkbox-label">
  <input type="checkbox" class="mdst-checkbox" />
  Label text
</label>

<!-- Standalone -->
<input type="checkbox" class="mdst-checkbox" />

<!-- States -->
<input type="checkbox" class="mdst-checkbox" checked />
<input type="checkbox" class="mdst-checkbox" disabled />
```

---

### Code `.mdst-code`

Inline code component for displaying code snippets within text.

Classes:
- `.mdst-code`

```html
<p>Use <code class="mdst-code">const x = 1</code> to declare a variable.</p>
```

---

### Color Picker `.mdst-color-picker`

Native color picker input styled to match the design system.

Classes:
- `.mdst-color-picker`
- `.mdst-color-picker__input`
- `.mdst-color-picker__text`
- `.mdst-color-picker--square`

```html
<!-- Color input only -->
<div class="mdst-color-picker">
  <input type="color" class="mdst-color-picker__input" value="#000000" />
</div>

<!-- With text input -->
<div class="mdst-color-picker">
  <input type="color" class="mdst-color-picker__input" value="#4A3F1F" />
  <input type="text" class="mdst-color-picker__text" value="#4A3F1F" />
</div>

<!-- Square variant -->
<div class="mdst-color-picker mdst-color-picker--square">
  <input type="color" class="mdst-color-picker__input" value="#F4E3C1" />
  <input type="text" class="mdst-color-picker__text" value="#F4E3C1" />
</div>
```

---

### Details `.mdst-details`

Expandable details/accordion component with section variants.

Classes:
- `.mdst-details`
- `.mdst-details--borderless`
- `.mdst-details--compact`
- `.mdst-details--section`

```html
<!-- Basic details -->
<details class="mdst-details">
  <summary>Click to expand</summary>
  <p>Content goes here.</p>
</details>

<!-- Open by default -->
<details class="mdst-details" open>
  <summary>Already open</summary>
  <p>Content goes here.</p>
</details>

<!-- Section variant -->
<details class="mdst-details mdst-details--section">
  <summary>Section Title</summary>
  <p>Content goes here.</p>
</details>
```

---

### Dialog `.mdst-dialog`

Modal dialog component with header, body, footer structure and multiple sizes.

Classes:
- `.mdst-dialog`
- `.mdst-dialog-body`
- `.mdst-dialog-close`
- `.mdst-dialog-footer`
- `.mdst-dialog-header`
- `.mdst-dialog-title`
- `.mdst-dialog--full`
- `.mdst-dialog--lg`
- `.mdst-dialog--sm`

```html
<dialog id="my-dialog" class="mdst-dialog">
  <div class="mdst-dialog-header">
    <h2 class="mdst-dialog-title">Dialog Title</h2>
    <button class="mdst-dialog-close" commandfor="my-dialog" command="close">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="mdst-dialog-body">
    <p>Dialog content goes here.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="mdst-dialog-footer">
    <button class="mdst-button mdst-button--ghost" commandfor="my-dialog" command="close">Cancel</button>
    <button class="mdst-button mdst-button--inverted" commandfor="my-dialog" command="close">Confirm</button>
  </div>
</dialog>

<button commandfor="my-dialog" command="show-modal">Open Dialog</button>
```

---

### Dropdown `.mdst-dropdown`

Native select dropdown with ghost and inline variants in multiple sizes.

Classes:
- `.mdst-dropdown`
- `.mdst-dropdown--ghost`
- `.mdst-dropdown--inline`
- `.mdst-dropdown--lg`
- `.mdst-dropdown--sm`

```html
<!-- Basic dropdown -->
<select class="mdst-dropdown">
  <option value="">Select an option</option>
  <option value="1">Option 1</option>
  <option value="2">Option 2</option>
</select>

<!-- With optgroups -->
<select class="mdst-dropdown">
  <option value="">Choose a fruit</option>
  <optgroup label="Citrus">
    <option value="orange">Orange</option>
    <option value="lemon">Lemon</option>
  </optgroup>
  <optgroup label="Berries">
    <option value="strawberry">Strawberry</option>
    <option value="blueberry">Blueberry</option>
  </optgroup>
</select>

<!-- Inline usage -->
<p>Sort by
  <select class="mdst-dropdown mdst-dropdown--inline mdst-dropdown--ghost">
    <option value="newest">Newest</option>
    <option value="oldest">Oldest</option>
  </select>
</p>
```

---

### Input `.mdst-input`

Text input component with ghost variant, sizes, and error states.

Classes:
- `.mdst-input`

```html
<!-- Text input -->
<input type="text" class="mdst-input" placeholder="Enter text" />

<!-- Email input -->
<input type="email" class="mdst-input" placeholder="you@example.com" />

<!-- Textarea -->
<textarea class="mdst-input" placeholder="Write something..."></textarea>

<!-- Disabled -->
<input type="text" class="mdst-input" disabled />
```

---

### OTP Input `.mdst-otp-input`

One-time password input with auto-advance, paste support, and validation states.

Classes:
- `.mdst-otp-input`
- `.mdst-otp-input-digit`
- `.mdst-otp-input-separator`
- `.mdst-otp-input--error`
- `.mdst-otp-input--success`

```html
<!-- 4-digit code -->
<div class="mdst-otp-input">
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" class="mdst-otp-input-digit" inputmode="numeric" />
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" class="mdst-otp-input-digit" inputmode="numeric" />
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" class="mdst-otp-input-digit" inputmode="numeric" />
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" class="mdst-otp-input-digit" inputmode="numeric" />
</div>

<!-- With separator -->
<div class="mdst-otp-input">
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" class="mdst-otp-input-digit" inputmode="numeric" />
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" class="mdst-otp-input-digit" inputmode="numeric" />
  <span class="mdst-otp-input-separator"></span>
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" class="mdst-otp-input-digit" inputmode="numeric" />
  <input type="text" maxlength="1" class="mdst-otp-input-digit" inputmode="numeric" />
</div>

<!-- Error state -->
<div class="mdst-otp-input mdst-otp-input--error">...</div>

<!-- Success state -->
<div class="mdst-otp-input mdst-otp-input--success">...</div>
```

---

### Popover `.mdst-popover`

Popover component using the native Popover API for tooltips and dropdowns.

Classes:
- `.mdst-popover`
- `.mdst-popover--anchored`
- `.mdst-popover--lg`
- `.mdst-popover--sm`

```html
<!-- Basic popover -->
<button popovertarget="my-popover">Toggle Popover</button>

<div id="my-popover" class="mdst-popover" popover>
  <p>Popover content</p>
</div>

<!-- Anchored popover -->
<button id="trigger" popovertarget="anchored">Open Menu</button>

<div id="anchored" class="mdst-popover mdst-popover--anchored" popover anchor="trigger">
  <p>Anchored below the button</p>
</div>

<!-- Manual popover -->
<div id="manual" class="mdst-popover" popover="manual">
  <p>Won't close on outside click</p>
</div>
```

---

### Pre `.mdst-pre`

Preformatted code block component for displaying multi-line code.

Classes:
- `.mdst-pre`
- `.mdst-pre--borderless`
- `.mdst-pre--compact`
- `.mdst-pre--scroll`

```html
<!-- Default (wraps text) -->
<pre class="mdst-pre">{
  "json": "content"
}</pre>

<!-- Compact -->
<pre class="mdst-pre mdst-pre--compact">single line</pre>

<!-- Borderless -->
<pre class="mdst-pre mdst-pre--borderless">no border</pre>

<!-- Horizontal scroll -->
<pre class="mdst-pre mdst-pre--scroll">long content...</pre>
```

---

### Radio `.mdst-radio`

Radio button component with label support and group layout.

Classes:
- `.mdst-radio`
- `.mdst-radio-group`
- `.mdst-radio-label`
- `.mdst-radio-group--horizontal`

```html
<!-- With label (recommended) -->
<label class="mdst-radio-label">
  <input type="radio" name="group" class="mdst-radio" />
  Label text
</label>

<!-- Radio group (vertical) -->
<div class="mdst-radio-group">
  <label class="mdst-radio-label">
    <input type="radio" name="group" class="mdst-radio" checked />
    Option 1
  </label>
  <label class="mdst-radio-label">
    <input type="radio" name="group" class="mdst-radio" />
    Option 2
  </label>
</div>

<!-- Radio group (horizontal) -->
<div class="mdst-radio-group mdst-radio-group--horizontal">
  ...
</div>
```

---

### Range `.mdst-range`

Range slider input styled to match the design system.

Classes:
- `.mdst-range`

```html
<!-- Basic range -->
<input type="range" class="mdst-range" min="0" max="100" value="50" />

<!-- With steps -->
<input type="range" class="mdst-range" min="0" max="100" value="25" step="25" />

<!-- Disabled -->
<input type="range" class="mdst-range" min="0" max="100" value="75" disabled />
```

---

### Table `.mdst-table`

Table component with bordered, striped, compact, equal, and stacked variants.

Classes:
- `.mdst-table`
- `.mdst-table-wrap`
- `.mdst-table--bordered`
- `.mdst-table--compact`
- `.mdst-table--fixed`
- `.mdst-table--stack`
- `.mdst-table--striped`

```html
<!-- Basic table -->
<table class="mdst-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Header</th>
      <th>Header</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Cell</td>
      <td>Cell</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<!-- With scroll wrapper -->
<div class="mdst-table-wrap">
  <table class="mdst-table">...</table>
</div>

<!-- Stack on mobile -->
<table class="mdst-table mdst-table--stack">...</table>

<!-- Combined variants -->
<table class="mdst-table mdst-table--bordered mdst-table--striped">...</table>
```

---

### Tag `.mdst-tag`

Inline labels for status, categories, and metadata. Supports solid, subtle, and ghost variants with optional dismiss button.

Classes:
- `.mdst-tag`
- `.mdst-tag-dismiss`
- `.mdst-tag--error`
- `.mdst-tag--ghost`
- `.mdst-tag--interactive`
- `.mdst-tag--lg`
- `.mdst-tag--muted`
- `.mdst-tag--pill`
- `.mdst-tag--sm`
- `.mdst-tag--solid`
- `.mdst-tag--subtle`
- `.mdst-tag--success`

```html
<!-- Default tag -->
<span class="mdst-tag">Tag</span>

<!-- Variants -->
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--solid">Solid</span>
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--subtle">Subtle</span>
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--ghost">Ghost</span>

<!-- Pill shape -->
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--pill">Pill</span>

<!-- Status colors -->
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--success">Active</span>
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--error">Failed</span>
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--muted">Archived</span>

<!-- Status + variant combos -->
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--success mdst-tag--solid">Online</span>
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--error mdst-tag--subtle">Offline</span>

<!-- Sizes -->
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--sm">Small</span>
<span class="mdst-tag mdst-tag--lg">Large</span>

<!-- Dismissible -->
<span class="mdst-tag">
  Label
  <button class="mdst-tag-dismiss" aria-label="Remove">&times;</button>
</span>
```

---

### Tooltip `.mdst-tooltip`

Tooltip component using the native Popover API and CSS anchor positioning.

Classes:
- `.mdst-tooltip`

```html
<!-- Trigger button -->
<button id="my-trigger" popovertarget="my-tooltip">
  Hover or click me
</button>

<!-- Tooltip -->
<div id="my-tooltip" class="mdst-tooltip" popover anchor="my-trigger">
  Helpful tooltip text
</div>
```

---

### Typography `.mdst-*`

Typography utilities for headings, body text, small text, and font styles.

Classes:
- `.mdst-a`
- `.mdst-blockquote`
- `.mdst-em`
- `.mdst-h1`
- `.mdst-h2`
- `.mdst-h3`
- `.mdst-h4`
- `.mdst-h5`
- `.mdst-h6`
- `.mdst-hr`
- `.mdst-li`
- `.mdst-mark`
- `.mdst-ol`
- `.mdst-p`
- `.mdst-small`
- `.mdst-strong`
- `.mdst-ul`
- `.mdst-hr--flush`
- `.mdst-p--lg`
- `.mdst-p--muted`
- `.mdst-p--sm`
- `.mdst-ul--unstyled`

```html
<!-- Headings -->
<h1 class="mdst-h1">Heading 1</h1>
<h2 class="mdst-h2">Heading 2</h2>

<!-- Paragraph -->
<p class="mdst-p">Default paragraph.</p>
<p class="mdst-p mdst-p--muted">Muted text.</p>

<!-- Inline -->
<a href="#" class="mdst-a">Link</a>
<strong class="mdst-strong">Bold</strong>
<em class="mdst-em">Italic</em>
<mark class="mdst-mark">Highlight</mark>

<!-- Blockquote -->
<blockquote class="mdst-blockquote">Quote</blockquote>

<!-- Lists -->
<ul class="mdst-ul">
  <li class="mdst-li">Item</li>
</ul>
```

---

### Utilities `.mdst-*`

Small utility classes for common layout and text patterns — screen-reader-only, truncation, centering, and more.

Classes:
- `.mdst-mono`
- `.mdst-muted`
- `.mdst-sr-only`
- `.mdst-truncate`

```html
<!-- Screen reader only -->
<span class="mdst-sr-only">Skip to content</span>

<!-- Truncated text -->
<div class="mdst-truncate" style="max-width: 12rem">
  Long text that will be truncated...
</div>

<!-- Muted text -->
<span class="mdst-muted">Secondary text</span>

<!-- Monospace text -->
<code class="mdst-mono">monospace</code>
```

---

## Theming Example

```css
:root {
  --mdst-color-fg: #000;
  --mdst-color-bg: #fff;
  --mdst-color-border: #000;
  --mdst-color-muted: #666;
  --mdst-color-subtle: #f5f5f5;
  --mdst-color-surface: #f5f5f5;
  --mdst-color-focus: #000;
  --mdst-color-error: #dc2626;
  --mdst-color-success: #16a34a;
  --mdst-font-sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
  --mdst-font-mono: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
  --mdst-line-height: 1.5;
  --mdst-text-xs: 0.75rem;
  --mdst-text-sm: 0.875rem;
  --mdst-text-base: 1rem;
  --mdst-text-lg: 1.125rem;
  --mdst-text-xl: 1.25rem;
  --mdst-space-px: 0.0625rem;
  --mdst-space-1: 0.25rem;
  --mdst-space-2: 0.5rem;
  --mdst-space-3: 0.75rem;
  --mdst-space-4: 1rem;
  --mdst-space-5: 1.25rem;
  --mdst-space-6: 1.5rem;
  --mdst-space-8: 2rem;
  --mdst-radius: 0;
  --mdst-border-width: 0.0625em;
  --mdst-transition-fast: 50ms ease-out;
  --mdst-transition: 100ms ease-out;
}
```

---

## Quick Class Reference

Button:         .mdst-button  |  --ghost  --inverted  --lg  --sm
Card:           .mdst-card  +  -body  -footer  -header  |  --borderless  --compact  --flush  --interactive
Checkbox:       .mdst-checkbox  +  -label
Code:           .mdst-code
Color Picker:   .mdst-color-picker  +  __input  __text  |  --square
Details:        .mdst-details  |  --borderless  --compact  --section
Dialog:         .mdst-dialog  +  -body  -close  -footer  -header  -title  |  --full  --lg  --sm
Dropdown:       .mdst-dropdown  |  --ghost  --inline  --lg  --sm
Input:          .mdst-input
OTP Input:      .mdst-otp-input  +  -digit  -separator  |  --error  --success
Popover:        .mdst-popover  |  --anchored  --lg  --sm
Pre:            .mdst-pre  |  --borderless  --compact  --scroll
Radio:          .mdst-radio  +  -group  -label  |  --horizontal
Range:          .mdst-range
Table:          .mdst-table  +  -wrap  |  --bordered  --compact  --fixed  --stack  --striped
Tag:            .mdst-tag  +  -dismiss  |  --error  --ghost  --interactive  --lg  --muted  --pill  --sm  --solid  --subtle  --success
Tooltip:        .mdst-tooltip
Typography:     .mdst-a  .mdst-blockquote  .mdst-em  .mdst-h1  .mdst-h2  .mdst-h3  .mdst-h4  .mdst-h5  .mdst-h6  .mdst-hr  .mdst-li  .mdst-mark  .mdst-ol  .mdst-p  .mdst-small  .mdst-strong  .mdst-ul  |  --flush  --lg  --muted  --sm  --unstyled
Utilities:      .mdst-mono  .mdst-muted  .mdst-sr-only  .mdst-truncate
